round: 8 of the GPU sec10 GEMM-fusion (attention) axis
host: ubu-2 RTX 5070 sm_120 driver 580 (48 SMs, 0 compute procs at fire = uncontended)
verdict_tier: ORANGE INSUFFICIENT (quantified-partial; pre-registered above-cuBLAS-stack NOT hit, but largest single-round gap closure of the 8-round campaign)
algorithm: TRUE FlashAttention-2 (Dao 2023): online softmax INSIDE fused kernel, m_i/l_i running across all K/V tiles, O accumulator REGISTER-RESIDENT across the entire K/V loop, S/P resident in smem only for the wmma-load-A handoff, ONE launch, inner GEMMs via wmma::mma_sync m16n16k16 fp16 fp32-acc
key_distinction_from_prior_rounds: ROUND-4 attempted reg-O and FAILED numeric (result.json: 'wrong m16n16k16 fp32 C-frag row map'). ROUND-8 fixed via empirical frag_probe.cu: elems {0,1,4,5} -> row=lane/4, elems {2,3,6,7} -> row=lane/4+8 (round-4 used the matrix_a convention {0..3}/{4..7}, not the accumulator). Single fix -> 5.3-6.9x -> 1.60-1.99x.

ptxas_clean.smem_reduction_vs_r4: 28864 B -> 1728 B (16.7x reduction: o_tile + wide BK removed)

numeric_handptx_sm90_jit_sm120.gate: rel_rowscale <= 1e-2 vs f64 CPU reference (the honest per-row-scaled metric)

win_distance: 1.60-1.99x slower (need a further sub-2x to flip; remaining wall = smem S/P round-trip + per-row softmax serial loop)

regO_BK256_wide_KV.interpretation: the wide-KV lever AMORTIZED THE OLD O-round-trip cost; with O in regs there is no longer any O traffic to amortize, so the wide-KV cost becomes pure overhead (wider softmax pass, more smem)

regO_2warp_BM32.interpretation: marginal regression; per-row softmax stays 16-lane sequential so doubling warps does not speed up the softmax phase. Below-saturation at small N (grid=16 vs 48 SMs).

binding_constraint: at d=64 the per-tile softmax + smem S/P round-trip is the residual wall (after reg-O removed the O round-trip). Eliminating it requires register-S + warp-shuffle softmax + mma.x4-from-regs feeding P.V -- substantial rewrite, deferred.
section10_box: [x] (launch-amort PR #1028) -- NOT touched; GEMM-fusion (attention) axis remains NOT-won at d=64
paper_reason: ORANGE INSUFFICIENT + re-confirmation of a wall already quantified in rounds 4/5/7; project.tape paper_gate forbids 🟠 and paper_significance forbids re-confirmation papers
next_round_wedge: register-resident S + warp-shuffle softmax + mma.x4-from-regs P.V (the next single algorithmic lever after reg-O; expected to push below 1.0x at large N)

invariants.codegen_untouched: compiler/codegen/*.hexa UNTOUCHED (hand-emit PTX path via nvcc-lowered CUDA-C; the algorithm is mine, lowering is mechanical)
invariants.single_launch: TRUE (1 launch vs cuBLAS-TC 3-launch moat preserved)
